name: stackra/support
purpose: Support utilities and helpers for Stackra packages — Reflection, Str, Arr, Path, CaseConverter, EmailValidator, Password, plus true-singleton and event-emitter traits.
capabilities: True Singleton trait (never more than one instance)
input() helper for HTML array names + boolean coercion
when_to_use: Any package needs a string / array / reflection / validation helper that Laravel's built-ins do not cover.
when_not_to_use: For DTOs and structured value objects, use spatie/laravel-data or hand-rolled readonly classes instead.
